subject: A serpentine elemental lizard composed of living flame, body coiling sinuously through a black ember-strewn void; orange-yellow fire forms its scales and silhouette
description: A long, serpentine elemental lizard sweeps diagonally across a near-black background, its body rendered as ribbons and tongues of bright orange and yellow fire. The creature has a draconic head with glowing eyes and a coiling neck, scales suggested by interlocking flame-shapes that taper into a whipping tail. Sparks and small embers drift through the dark void around it, with deeper red-orange glow pooling in the lower background as if the beast hovers above smoldering coals. There are no other figures present — the entire composition is the burning lizard against blackness, painterly and dynamic.
background: black void with drifting embers and a low red-orange glow
